TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-tattoo2_pawan 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: a mqedin mesa rudan cbeyo wa asi ka jyunansay sa patisan sa.
S.PHON: a mqedin mesa ɾudan ʦbejo wa asi ka jjunansaj sa patisan sa.
S.FORM: a mqedin mesa rudan cbeyo wa asi ka jyunansay sa patisan sa.
S.PHON: a mqedin mesa ɾudan ʦbejo wa asi ka jjunansaj sa patisan sa.
S.TRANSL: 據說,我們的女性祖先必須到了十幾歲的時候才可以紋面.
It is said that our ancestors cannot get their faces tattooed until their are at least teenage.

S.FORM: patisundaha a a dqeras malux patisan so.
S.PHON: patisundaħa a a dqeɾas malux patisan so.
S.FORM: patisundaha a a dqeras malux patisan so.
S.PHON: patisundaħa a a dqeɾas malux patisan so.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼要紋面呢?
Why do they tattoo their faces?

S.FORM: malu qitaan.
S.PHON: malu qitaan.
S.FORM: malu qitaan.
S.PHON: malu qitaan.
S.TRANSL: [因為] 漂亮.
[because it makes them] beautiful.

S.FORM: ini kkerung si ma.
S.PHON: ini kkeɾuŋ si ma.
S.FORM: ini kkerung si ma.
S.PHON: ini kkeɾuŋ si ma.
S.TRANSL: [臉] 不會起皺紋.
[their faces] would not wrinkle.

S.FORM: a mtbeno klaali qitaan dqerasdaha si.
S.PHON: a mtbeno klaali qitaan dqeɾasdaħa si.
S.FORM: a mtbeno klaali qitaan dqerasdaha si.
S.PHON: a mtbeno klaali qitaan dqeɾasdaħa si.
S.TRANSL: 據說紋面後,他們每天臉看起來都是豐腴的.
It is said that after getting their faces tatooed their faces look plump every day.

S.FORM: ma meniq a.
S.PHON: ma meniq a.
S.FORM: ma meniq a.
S.PHON: ma meniq a.
S.TRANSL: 另外呢,
besides,

S.FORM: sricuhdaha si o.
S.PHON: sɾiʦuħdaħa si o.
S.FORM: sricuhdaha si o.
S.PHON: sɾiʦuħdaħa si o.
S.TRANSL: 她們用什麼東西擦咧?
What do they use to powder their faces?

S.FORM: dqeras ka ga n bagah henu so.
S.PHON: dqeɾas ka ga n bagaħ ħenu so.
S.FORM: dqeras ka ga n bagah henu so.
S.PHON: dqeɾas ka ga n bagaħ ħenu so.
S.TRANSL: 臉...那個木炭...
Face...that charcoal...

S.FORM: rkeruk harung si.
S.PHON: ɾkeɾuk ħaɾuŋ si.
S.FORM: rkeruk harung si.
S.PHON: ɾkeɾuk ħaɾuŋ si.
S.TRANSL: 據說就是那個二葉松的煙垢,
It is said that is ashes of burned charcoal of pine.

S.FORM: a sricuh dqeras.
S.PHON: a sɾiʦuħ dqeɾas.
S.FORM: a sricuh dqeras.
S.PHON: a sɾiʦuħ dqeɾas.
S.TRANSL: 擦臉.

TRANSL.notes: (which is used to) power the face

S.TRANSL: power the face

S.FORM: kiya mqrehaq kii de so truma si ma.
S.PHON: kija mqɾeħaq kii de so tɾuma si ma.
S.FORM: kiya mqrehaq kii de so truma si ma.
S.PHON: kija mqɾeħaq kii de so tɾuma si ma.

TRANSL.notes: (紋面的時候)煙垢最好是能滲透到臉皮裡面.

S.TRANSL: 煙垢最好是能滲透到臉皮裡面.

TRANSL.notes: (As for tattooing their face,) ashes of burned charcoal should go into their faces.

S.TRANSL: ashes of burned charcoal should go into their faces.

S.FORM: mqrehaq si kii malu si.
S.PHON: mqɾeħaq si kii malu si.
S.FORM: mqrehaq si kii malu si.
S.PHON: mqɾeħaq si kii malu si.
S.TRANSL: 結痂、脫落之後,會比較好.
After the scab falls off, [it would look] good.

S.FORM: ma meniq ka rupun si o.
S.PHON: ma meniq ka ɾupun si o.
S.FORM: ma meniq ka rupun si o.
S.PHON: ma meniq ka ɾupun si o.
S.TRANSL: 那麼我們另外一個缺齒的族規的話,

TRANSL.notes: And as for another custom, extracting (canine) teeth,

S.TRANSL: And as for another custom, extracting teeth,

S.FORM: kirei qitaan ka rupun uri o angalan waqi mesa ka rudan cbeyo.
S.PHON: kiɾei qitaan ka ɾupun uɾi o aŋalan waqi mesa ka ɾudan ʦbejo.
S.FORM: kirei qitaan ka rupun uri o angalan waqi mesa ka rudan cbeyo.
S.PHON: kiɾei qitaan ka ɾupun uɾi o aŋalan waqi mesa ka ɾudan ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 我們把犬齒拔掉,看起來也是很漂亮的,我們的祖先是這麼說的.
Our ancestors said that we look beautiful after we extract our canine teeth.

S.FORM: a so uh kiya naq da.
S.PHON: a so uħ kija naq da.
S.FORM: a so uh kiya naq da.
S.PHON: a so uħ kija naq da.
S.TRANSL: 啊,就是這樣而已了.
Ah! That's all.
